headline: Akamai (AKAM) Completes Convertible Senior Notes Issuance
summary: Akamai Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ:AKAM) is one of the 10 Best Stocks in Steve Cohen’s Portfolio. On May 22, 2026, Akamai Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ:AKAM) completed a private placement issuing $3.5 billion in 0.00% Convertible Senior Notes to qualified institutional buyers. The transaction is split evenly into $1.75 billion tranches maturing in 2030 and 2032. The company […]
